Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Sajid Shabber.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Martyn Boswell is present.
Attorney Ashley Littlefield appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501a, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of November 9, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
